title: How Lu Xun, a Famous Chinese Writer, Became a Cute Communist Mascot
summary_full: The Chinese Communist Party has turned Lu Xun, a Mao-era hero who excoriated the establishment, into a bland, Disney-style character.
summary_public: The Chinese Communist Party has turned Lu Xun, a Mao-era hero who excoriated the establishment, into a bland, Disney-style character.
